hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" in *.cs|*.csproj) dotnet format --include "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" --no-restore --verbosity quiet >/dev/null 2>&1 || true ;; esac

case "$CLAUDE_BASH_COMMAND" in *azd*down*|*az*group*delete*|*rm*-rf*) echo 'BLOCKED: confirm with the user before running destructive Azure / filesystem commands. Run interactively if you actually want this.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac
